task: RIGOURATE Reproduction + SimClaim Differentiation v1 - Section 1 Official Resource Audit
blocked_reason: arXiv v2 (12 Jan 2026) of RIGOURATE contains a placeholder string '[Github/HF Link]' in place of the code/data/model URL. As of audit date 2026-07-05, no concrete GitHub repository, HuggingFace model, dataset release, annotation script, supplementary material, or runnable example has been located via web search of arXiv, GitHub, HuggingFace, ACL Anthology, and author homepages. The paper text describes 10K+ claim-evidence sets, 8 LLM annotators, peer-review calibration, a fine-tuned multimodal reranker, and a fine-tuned overstatement scoring model, but none of these artifacts are publicly available. Consequently, a full official reproduction is not currently possible from public resources.
assets_missing: GitHub repository (placeholder only in arXiv v2)
HuggingFace model repository (placeholder only in arXiv v2)
Training/evaluation dataset (10K+ claim-evidence sets described but not released)
Annotation scripts (LLM annotator + peer-review calibration pipeline)
next_actions_if_released: Re-audit arXiv for v3 or later versions that may replace the placeholder
Check corresponding author email for code/data request
Monitor ACL Anthology for camera-ready supplementary
Monitor OpenReview for ICLR/NeurIPS dataset release
proxy_baseline_note: Per task spec section IV, when official model is unavailable, a RIGOURATE-style scalar proxy baseline may be constructed. The proxy MUST NOT be claimed as official RIGOURATE; it must be labeled as 'RIGOURATE-style' or 'scalar overstatement proxy'. See section IV outputs for proxy construction.
